chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP NO.D-723/2013 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 23.09.2021 Mr. Muhammad Ashraf Sammo advocate for petitioners. Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG alongwith Abdul Jabbar Shaikh, Law Officer, SELD................ Heard and perused the record. 2. Grievance redressal committee as notified by the Secretary Education shall examine the case of the petitioners within the spirit of examination conducted by the NTS and petitioners’ qualifications as well as locality of the area where they are contending that schools are closed due to non-availability of teachers though they qualified the NTS examination; respondents’ plea is that there was only one post required to them; whereas such plea is disputed by learned counsel for the petitioners. However this issue pertains to the year 2013 and it would be appropriate to refer the matter to that Committee to examine their documents and other criteria, thereafter pass appropriate recommendations in accordance with law. 3. Needless to mention that any recommendations by the department would not be treated as pejorative act and competent authority would be at liberty to decide the fate within the need-base policy relating to that area and the qualifications of the petitioners; and will not be challenged by the petitioners as they are also appearing in recent tests to be conducted by the IBA. Secretary - { 2 } - Schools shall also ensure that close schools are re-started by providing all facilities in the area of Union Council Bijora, Taluka Sujawal, District Sujawal. 4.

Needless to mention that any recommendations by the department would not be treated as pejorative act and competent authority would be at liberty to decide the fate within the need-base policy relating to that area and the qualifications of the petitioners; and will not be challenged by the petitioners as they are also appearing in recent tests to be conducted by the IBA. Secretary - { 2 } - Schools shall also ensure that close schools are re-started by providing all facilities in the area of Union Council Bijora, Taluka Sujawal, District Sujawal. 4. Needless to mention that this order is in-personam and shall not be treated as in-rem for likewise other candidates if available. Petition is disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E
